name: Margarine

pros.title: often inexpensive
pros.explanation: A practical reason it still exists in real kitchens.

pros.title: very familiar product
pros.explanation: People know what it is and how to use it.

cons.title: processing is a major category negative
cons.explanation: This is the core reason margarine makes a clean weak anchor in this category.

cons.title: ingredient simplicity is poor
cons.explanation: Much weaker trust and wholefood fit than stronger oils/fats anchors.

cons.title: quality varies wildly by formulation
cons.explanation: That makes the category fit feel unstable and less trustworthy.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
Configured intentionally as a weak processed-fat anchor rather than a best-case margarine formulation.
